text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho has had an incredible three years
and achieved fantastic results.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When we first met, she was still just an immature
and demanding girl.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Familiar!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What are you doing in here?! Didn't I tell you I
was gonna try a new spell today?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As always, she calls me her familiar and passes her
days doing exactly as she pleases.
choice_data_list:
Sorry. I'm just putting together some documents
for your ra—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Huh?! You're such a slacker.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Meh, whatever. You just stay right there.
...Unbelievable.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Lake ☆ attach ☆ witch run! Familiar, become
invincible!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! ♪ Looks like my little test worked out
pretty well!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Your body is in peak condition right now, and
your mind is super sharp too.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Now, let's hurry up and see what you can do!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Genius Magical Girl Sweepy's magic is
perfect, so don't you worry about a thing! Here
we go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I close my eyes and prepare myself for the
inevitable pain. I can only hope I don't end up in
the hospital...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Click!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: You really think I'd actually hit you? Dum-dum.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
That's your punishment for breaking your promise
'cause of work. Don't let it happen again, or else!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. But I gotta say... this picture of you with
your eyes squeezed shut is sooo... lame! Hehe,
you loser...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: No chance! ♪ Hehehe.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You're such a doofus. There's no way I'd cast any
of my most powerful spells on you.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
...Why don't you understand that you don't need
it?
